Class: Coordinate

bemap.Coordinate(lon, lat)

Base class for geographical coordinate.

Constructor

new Coordinate(lon, lat)

Parameters:
Name Type Description
lon double Longitude in degrees decimal (WGS84).
lat double Latitude in degrees decimal (WGS84).
